texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child policy:
texts.text: Child policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For children under 3 years of age, sharing with adult(s) is free of charge.
texts.text: For children under 3 years of age, sharing with adult(s) is free of charge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For  a minimum of 2 children between 3 and 16 years occupying their own room, the charge is 75% of the room rates as per the occupancy.
texts.text: For  a minimum of 2 children between 3 and 16 years occupying their own room, the charge is 75% of the room rates as per the occupancy.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For a child aged 3 to16 years sharing with 1 adult, the child will pay 50% of the adult in a double room.
texts.text: For a child aged 3 to16 years sharing with 1 adult, the child will pay 50% of the adult in a double room.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For children aged 3 to 16 years sharing with 2 adults, 50% of the per person adult twin rate will apply for each child.
texts.text: For children aged 3 to 16 years sharing with 2 adults, 50% of the per person adult twin rate will apply for each child.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Meals:
texts.text: Meals:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Meals and amenities USD 55 per person.
texts.text: Meals and amenities USD 55 per person.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Supplements:
texts.text: Supplements:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A festive  season  supplement of USD 40 per person, per day, will apply to all bookings on the following dates: 24 TH ,  25 TH ,  26 TH ,  31 ST   December  2024,  and  1 ST January 2025.
texts.text: A festive  season  supplement of USD 40 per person, per day, will apply to all bookings on the following dates: 24 TH ,  25 TH ,  26 TH ,  31 ST   December  2024,  and  1 ST January 2025.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Easter supplement of USD 20 per person, per day, will apply to all bookings on 29 TH , 30 TH , 31 ST  March and 1 ST   April 2024.
texts.text: Easter supplement of USD 20 per person, per day, will apply to all bookings on 29 TH , 30 TH , 31 ST  March and 1 ST   April 2024.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Check-in and check-out times:
texts.text: Check-in and check-out times:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12:00 PM on the day of arrival and should be vacated by 10:00 AM on the day of departure.
texts.text: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12:00 PM on the day of arrival and should be vacated by 10:00 AM on the day of departure.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Special  consideration  may  be  made  for  extended  departure  time  subject  to availability
texts.text: Special  consideration  may  be  made  for  extended  departure  time  subject  to availability

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In accordance with the rules and regulations of the lodge, all Kenyan residents have to provide a valid proof of identification (passport or national ID) to avail resident rate.
texts.text: In accordance with the rules and regulations of the lodge, all Kenyan residents have to provide a valid proof of identification (passport or national ID) to avail resident rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Kwenia Eco-Lodge regrets that no pets are allowed on the entire property
texts.text: Kwenia Eco-Lodge regrets that no pets are allowed on the entire property

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Provisional bookings:
texts.text: Provisional bookings:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Provisional bookings will be held and released in accordance with the terms set out below. Bookings held provisionally will be released automatically on expiry without prior notification. In times of high demand Ammodump Kwenia Limited reserves the right to increase or shorten the provisional booking expiry period
texts.text: Provisional bookings will be held and released in accordance with the terms set out below. Bookings held provisionally will be released automatically on expiry without prior notification. In times of high demand Ammodump Kwenia Limited reserves the right to increase or shorten the provisional booking expiry period

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation/Amendments and No Show
texts.text: Cancellation/Amendments and No Show

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations that are canceled, reduced in length of stay, or reduced in number of occupants are subject to cancellation and under the following terms:
texts.text: Reservations that are canceled, reduced in length of stay, or reduced in number of occupants are subject to cancellation and under the following terms:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 60 to 40 days: 20%
texts.text: 60 to 40 days: 20%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 39 to 20 days: 50%
texts.text: 39 to 20 days: 50%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 19 days prior to arrival, no show and under stay: 100%
texts.text: 19 days prior to arrival, no show and under stay: 100%

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Group conditions:
texts.text: Group conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Group bookings are defined as bookings for 10 or more tents.
texts.text: Group bookings are defined as bookings for 10 or more tents.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. A 25% non-refundable deposit is required upon confirmation and a further 25% deposit 60 days before arrival and completion before check in
texts.text: A 25% non-refundable deposit is required upon confirmation and a further 25% deposit 60 days before arrival and completion before check in

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Single room rate policy:
texts.text: Single room rate policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In peak season Kwenia Eco Lodge will confirm a maximum of 20% of a group at a single-room rate. Any additional single-room requests will be charged at a double room rate.
texts.text: In peak season Kwenia Eco Lodge will confirm a maximum of 20% of a group at a single-room rate. Any additional single-room requests will be charged at a double room rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In all other seasons, the number of single rooms allowed will depend on availability and the size of the group.
texts.text: In all other seasons, the number of single rooms allowed will depend on availability and the size of the group.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Tour leader rates:
texts.text: Tour leader rates:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. For every 15 full paying guests, 1 twin/double on a shared basis shall be included on  a  complimentary  basis  subject  to  availability  and  a  maximum  of  3  tour leaders.
texts.text: For every 15 full paying guests, 1 twin/double on a shared basis shall be included on  a  complimentary  basis  subject  to  availability  and  a  maximum  of  3  tour leaders.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Where the group is less than 15 paying guests, then the following rates for tour leaders will apply on a full board basis, and subject to availability.
texts.text: Where the group is less than 15 paying guests, then the following rates for tour leaders will apply on a full board basis, and subject to availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Tour leader rooms need to be pre-booked and confirmed at the time of booking.
texts.text: Tour leader rooms need to be pre-booked and confirmed at the time of booking.

texts.text: Agent FAM trip, FB & HB rates:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Agent rates are on a request basis and subject to availability
texts.text: Agent rates are on a request basis and subject to availability

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Agent  rates  are  not  applicable  over  the  peak  season,  Easter,  and  Christmas season.
texts.text: Agent  rates  are  not  applicable  over  the  peak  season,  Easter,  and  Christmas season.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Please  note  we  will  require  a  list  of  travel  agents  and  respective  companies before approval of FAM trip rates.
texts.text: Please  note  we  will  require  a  list  of  travel  agents  and  respective  companies before approval of FAM trip rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Agent rates are per person sharing twin/double per night will apply as per the table below: They are not combinable with any other offer or discount.
texts.text: Agent rates are per person sharing twin/double per night will apply as per the table below: They are not combinable with any other offer or discount.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Payment policy
texts.text: Payment policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Peak season: A 25% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due 45 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: Peak season: A 25% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due 45 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · High/Mid season: A 25% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due 15 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: High/Mid season: A 25% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due 15 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Low/Green season: Full payment is due 7 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: Low/Green season: Full payment is due 7 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Ammodump Kwenia Limited requires that the agent make a deposit for large or special groups.
texts.text: Ammodump Kwenia Limited requires that the agent make a deposit for large or special groups.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Should the agent fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the agent shall pay a three percent (3%) late payment fee per month (compounded). Delinquent payments shall be deemed a breach/default of contract and Ammodump Kwenia Limited thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.
texts.text: Should the agent fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the agent shall pay a three percent (3%) late payment fee per month (compounded). Delinquent payments shall be deemed a breach/default of contract and Ammodump Kwenia Limited thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the agent shall immediately replace the same with a bankers cheque or cash and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a returned cheque fee. Failure by the agent to replace the unpaid cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of the contract and Ammodump Kwenia Limited thereafter reserves the right to cancel of nullify this contract.
texts.text: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the agent shall immediately replace the same with a bankers cheque or cash and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a returned cheque fee. Failure by the agent to replace the unpaid cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of the contract and Ammodump Kwenia Limited thereafter reserves the right to cancel of nullify this contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Ammodump Kwenia Limited and/or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default of payment.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Ammodump Kwenia Limited and/or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default of payment.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Confidentiality:
texts.text: Confidentiality:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  agent  confirms  and  agrees  that  the  contents  of  this  agreement  are  strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: The  agent  confirms  and  agrees  that  the  contents  of  this  agreement  are  strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Variation:
texts.text: Variation:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ammodump Kwenia Limited reserves the right to  revise  or  alter  the  terms  and conditions, at its sole discretion, in the event of any unforeseen changes in rates offered  by  third-party  suppliers  and/or  in  government  taxes,  government  levies, park fees, concession fees, and conservancy fees.
texts.text: Ammodump Kwenia Limited reserves the right to  revise  or  alter  the  terms  and conditions, at its sole discretion, in the event of any unforeseen changes in rates offered  by  third-party  suppliers  and/or  in  government  taxes,  government  levies, park fees, concession fees, and conservancy fees.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Force Majeure:
texts.text: Force Majeure:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ammodump Kwenia Limited will not be liable to the agent or its clients for any act of God or force majeure that disrupts a client(s) itinerary, any planned activities or experience at or between any of Ammodump Kwenia Limited's properties, even if this  results  in  Ammodump  Kwenia  Limited's  inability  to  deliver  the  contracted service.
texts.text: Ammodump Kwenia Limited will not be liable to the agent or its clients for any act of God or force majeure that disrupts a client(s) itinerary, any planned activities or experience at or between any of Ammodump Kwenia Limited's properties, even if this  results  in  Ammodump  Kwenia  Limited's  inability  to  deliver  the  contracted service.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurance:
texts.text: Insurance:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Agents must ensure that their clients have adequate insurance cover for their intended itinerary and any additional activities including medical evacuation, repatriation, loss of personal belongings, and cancellation.
texts.text: Agents must ensure that their clients have adequate insurance cover for their intended itinerary and any additional activities including medical evacuation, repatriation, loss of personal belongings, and cancellation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Breach or default of contract:
texts.text: Breach or default of contract:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If  the  agent  fails  to  comply  with  any  of  the  above  terms  set  out  in  this  contract, Ammodump Kwenia Limited will consider the Agent in breach and/or in default of this contract. In the event of default and during the period of default, the rates stated in  this  contract  may  become  invalid.  Furthermore,  Ammodump  Kwenia  Limited reserves the right to cancel, without recourse, any bookings of the agent, whether paid  for  or  previously  confirmed.  Clearing  the  default  does  not  guarantee  the reinstatement of this contract, nor does it guarantee that any canceled bookings will be reinstated.
texts.text: If  the  agent  fails  to  comply  with  any  of  the  above  terms  set  out  in  this  contract, Ammodump Kwenia Limited will consider the Agent in breach and/or in default of this contract. In the event of default and during the period of default, the rates stated in  this  contract  may  become  invalid.  Furthermore,  Ammodump  Kwenia  Limited reserves the right to cancel, without recourse, any bookings of the agent, whether paid  for  or  previously  confirmed.  Clearing  the  default  does  not  guarantee  the reinstatement of this contract, nor does it guarantee that any canceled bookings will be reinstated.

texts.text: Liability:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ammodump Kwenia Limited does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident of any nature involving any client at any of the properties due to their negligence or willful misconduct.
texts.text: Ammodump Kwenia Limited does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident of any nature involving any client at any of the properties due to their negligence or willful misconduct.
